重生1988，杨明远成了杨树沟村人人可欺的傻子杨树生。家徒四壁，只有一个俏寡妇嫂子赵秀莲，含辛茹苦受尽欺凌。
看着无赖深夜翻墙，要把嫂子逼上绝路，蹲在墙根流口水的傻子，突然站了起来！
这一世，他不装了。
挖草药、搞倒卖、办工厂……他要抓住时代的脉搏，把那些欺负过嫂子的人统统踩在脚下！
“嫂子，别怕，以后换我来养你。”
当傻子开了窍，整个时代都将为之颤抖。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6a1f9b55da769bf339864184bbdee688","author":"落花无意水有声","author_id":"","book_id":"7606721711899151384","book_name":"乡村傻子逍遥快活","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8259人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":840,"name":"发家致富","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=840&name=发家致富&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7606721734212846104","read_count":"8259","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"169871"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"61","tags":"都市种田,都市,乡村,重生,发家致富","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2od3eb400c58b1b3e142564c892d873abf~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779385978&x-signature=q62%2Bceg0MD6bQAGEnr%2B246HGWD8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1946604563076988","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"19"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323015257FA527478771D5B263C4B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":5516,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10599,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":65},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick"
